buildCommand: npm run build --workspace=@watchpost/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@watchpost/web

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://watchpostapi-production.up.railway.app; frame-ancestors 'none'
